title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.180 - Venue of action, notice, how given
text:
215.180.  Venue of action, notice, how given. — The venue of any action or proceeding brought by the trustee under section 215.170 shall be in Cole County. Before declaring the principal of notes or bonds due and payable, the trustee shall first give thirty days' notice in writing to the governor, to the commission and to the attorney general of the state of Missouri.
(L. 1969 H.B. 130 § 28)
